=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Gate 3a — spawning validator.
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_cycle(phase-end) → Acknowledged: phase_ended for topic 'col-030'. Attribution is applied via the hook path (fire-and-forget). Use context_cycle_review to confirm session attribution.]
[Assistant] Both agents complete. One design decision to note: `suppress_contradicts` returns `(Vec<bool>, Vec<Option<u64>>)` (contradicting ID alongside keep-mask) to avoid re-traversal at the call site; and the `final_scores` rebinding uses an `if-expression` so the shadow is visible at Step 11. Chain suppression uses Option B (suppressed nodes still propagate) matching Architecture test case 4.

Component Map was pre-populated correctly by the synthesizer. Recording phase-end and running Gate 3a.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ToolContext Pattern: Pre-Validated Handler Context with Separate Capability Check
ADR-003 col-024: Structured Log Event on Primary-Path Fallback Activation
ADR-001 col-026: is_in_progress as Option<bool>, Not bool
ADR-004 col-022: Shared Validation Function for MCP Tool and Hook Handler
contradiction scan O(N) ONNX cost: cache in ContradictionScanCache, tick writes every 4th tick, context_status reads cache
